nodes.label: Causes of Losses in a Rising Market
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 110340_冰冰小美_这行情还能亏钱的。第一种大概率就是追涨杀跌+单一重仓导致的。第二种就是持有老登没有控制仓位，甚至补仓，经济数据都不支持补.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Chasing rallies, concentrating in legacy stocks without position control, and copying trades without a full framework are presented as sources of losses.
